Implement a modal dialog with proper focus trap and Escape key dismissal
Tab exits modal; no focus trap

function @N@({open,onClose,children}){const @ref@=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{if(open)@ref@.current?.focus();const h=e=>{if(e.key=='Escape')onClose()};document.addEventListener('keydown',h);return()=>document.removeEventListener('keydown',h)},[open]);if(!open)return null;return
e.stopPropagation()}>{children}
}

function @N@({open,onClose,children}){useEffect(()=>{document.body.style.overflow=open?'hidden':''},[open]);if(!open)return null;return
e.stopPropagation()} style={{background:'#fff',padding:'1.5rem',borderRadius:'8px'}}>{children}
}

function @N@({open,onClose,children}){useEffect(()=>{if(!open)return;const h=e=>{if(e.key=='Escape')onClose()};document.addEventListener('keydown',h);return()=>document.removeEventListener('keydown',h)},[open,onClose]);if(!open)return null;return
e.stopPropagation()} style={{background:'#fff',padding:'1.5rem',borderRadius:'8px'}}>{children}
}
Internal state diverges; no focus trap

function @N@({open,onClose,children}){const @ref@=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{if(!open)return;@ref@.current?.focus();const h=e=>{if(e.key=='Escape')onClose();if(e.key=='Tab'){const fs=@ref@.current.querySelectorAll('button,input,[tabindex]:not([tabindex=-1])');if(!fs.length)return;const f=fs[0],l=fs[fs.length-1];if(e.shiftKey&&document.activeElement===f){e.preventDefault();l.focus()}else if(!e.shiftKey&&document.activeElement===l){e.preventDefault();f.focus()}}};document.addEventListener('keydown',h);return()=>document.removeEventListener('keydown',h)},[open,onClose]);if(!open)return null;return
e.stopPropagation()} style={{background:'#fff',padding:'2rem',borderRadius:'8px'}}>{children}
}

e.stopPropagation()} style={{background:'#fff',padding:'2rem',borderRadius:'8px'}}>{children}
}
